name: CodeWorm
description: Trinity-built code watcher. Monitors worm_feed.log for broken files, reads scan results, lists broken code storage. Ethica's eyes on the codebase.
author: Victory

tools.name: worm_read_feed
tools.description: Read the worm feed log — last N entries of CodeWorm activity

tools.name: worm_analyze
tools.description: Analyze a specific file from the worm feed

tools.name: worm_status
tools.description: CodeWorm system status — active, last scan time, files watched

tools.name: worm_list_broken
tools.description: List all files in broken code storage

tools.name: worm_read_broken
tools.description: Read a specific broken file from storage

tools.name: worm_hunt
tools.description: Run the autonomous WormHunter bug scanner on a file or directory

tools.name: json_fix
tools.description: Reformat a JSON file to consistent 2-space indentation. Safe — parse-verify before write.

tools.name: worm_fix_json
tools.description: Bulk-fix all JSON files flagged by WormHunter as inconsistently formatted. Reads worm_feed.log, deduplicates, reformats all flagged files in one pass.
